case_title: COREY WILLIAMS VS. GEM PACUMIO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, COREY AS TO DEFENDANT PACUMIO, GEM PACUMIO, MARIVIC DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-13-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-11-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-20-2016
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE SEP-22-2016.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR VALERIE JAN HIGGINS.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 16362038)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100015439) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACUMIO, GEM PACUMIO, MARIVIC
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-12-2016. THE JUL-13-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100015439) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT PACUMIO, GEM

NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 16333055) FILED BY ATTORNEY STEPHENSON, MICHAEL O
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16059064) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, COREY SERVED FEB-23-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PACUMIO, MARIVIC
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 16144088) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, COREY JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR PAUL BEACH KUHL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-23-2016 THROUGH DEC-22-2016.
ARBITRATION ASSIGNMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
